resources.string: How to install a mod
Just follow the steps below — it takes about a minute.
Back
Screenshot for step %1$d
That\'s it — have fun!
Pick a mod you like
Open the catalog and tap the mod you want to install to open its page.
Tap "Download"
On the mod page tap the orange Download button at the bottom of the screen.
Wait for the download to finish
The file will be saved to your device. It usually takes a few seconds.
Tap the green "Install" button
Once the file is downloaded, tap the green Install button next to it.
Choose Minecraft in the app picker
Android will ask which app to open the file with — pick Minecraft from the list.
Minecraft will open automatically
The mod will be imported. Wait until the game finishes loading the content.
Enable Experimental features and mod in world settings

When creating a new world, scroll down in the world settings and turn on "Experimental gameplay" — most mods need it. In "Behavior packs" or "Resource packs" find the mod you just installed and tap "Activate".
Jump into the world
Create the world and start playing — the mod is now active and ready to use.
